acceptance_results.criterion: Migration script defaults to tenant_key=nrg and backfills tenant_id IS NULL rows.
Migration script has no rollback-to-null mode.
Active frontend bootstrap defaults and backend tests use nrg instead of legacy-default.

cleanup_notes: No long-running services were left running.
npm ci hydrated frontend dependencies in the isolated worktree for test execution.
completed_work: Changed tenant migration defaults from legacy-default to nrg.
Removed active rollback-to-null migration mode and Make target.
Changed configured table eligibility to tenant_id IS NULL, including rows with channel_id.
Updated active runbook, onboarding examples, frontend bootstrap defaults, and backend/frontend tests to nrg.
Recorded TMP-050 issue, work order, slice evidence, and handoff.
known_gaps: The migration was not executed against a remote live database in this agent session.
Database NOT NULL enforcement and tenant list/update UI are follow-up slices.

next_tasks.title: Tenant management admin list/update UI and API
Tenant NOT NULL enforcement and nullable-path audit

operator_message: TMP-050 makes nrg the canonical migration/default tenant and removes the active legacy-default rollback path.
risk_notes: Rollback for migrated production data is now an operational database restore concern, not an active codepath that preserves tenantless ownership.
summary: Replaced the legacy-default tenant migration path with canonical nrg tenant ownership and removed active rollback-to-null migration tooling.
